# SaaSCalc

> SaaSCalc is a Semantic SaaS Unit Economics Calculator Engine for founders and investors to compute and benchmark LTV and CAC dynamically. Instantly evaluate business health through accurate SaaS financial metrics.

## Main Tools
- [SaaS LTV & CAC Calculator](/): Calculate your startup's Customer Lifetime Value (LTV) and Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) ratio. Input Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR), Churn Rate, Gross Margin, and marketing expenses to get an instant visual benchmark against industry standards.

## Core Metrics Definitions
- LTV (Customer Lifetime Value): The total revenue a business can reasonably expect from a single customer account throughout the business relationship.
- CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost): The total cost of sales and marketing efforts that are needed to acquire a new customer.
- LTV:CAC Ratio: A core metric comparing the value of a customer over their lifetime to the cost of acquiring them. A ratio of 3:1 is generally considered healthy for SaaS businesses.
